lumpy.treatment: Isolate the animal, provide supportive care, and consult a veterinarian for vaccination and antiviral management.

healthy cow.treatment: No treatment required. Maintain proper nutrition and hygiene.

foot and mouth.treatment: Immediate isolation, disinfect environment, provide fluid therapy, and seek veterinary assistance.

healthy chicken.treatment: No treatment needed. Maintain clean housing and balanced diet.

anemia virus.treatment: Provide vitamin supplements, isolate infected birds, and consult a vet.

bumble foot.treatment: Clean the wound, apply antiseptic, and provide soft bedding.

fowl pox disease.treatment: Isolate infected birds and provide supportive care.

eye infection.treatment: Clean eyes with saline solution and consult a veterinarian.

foot and mouth.treatment: Isolate immediately and disinfect surroundings. Seek urgent veterinary care.

scabies.treatment: Apply anti-parasitic medication and isolate the animal.

goatpox.treatment: Isolate animal, provide supportive care, and vaccinate herd if possible.

soremouth.treatment: Apply topical antiseptics and isolate infected goats.
